name: Egg Tacos
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion and jalapeno pepper and sauté in 2 tablespoons olive oil until limp.
2. Beat the egg yolks with milk, chili powder, salt, and pepper to desired taste.
3. Stir in the cooked onions and peppers into the egg yolk mixture.
4. Beat the egg whites separately until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the egg yolk mixture.
6. Heat the remaining olive oil in a large, oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
7. Spread the egg mixture evenly in the skillet and cook until the eggs are set on the bottom.
8. Place the pan under the broiler and continue cooking until the top is lightly browned.
9. Warm the tortillas as desired.
10. To serve, divide the egg mixture into four portions.
11. Place a portion of egg in the center of each tortilla.
12. Top with shredded cheese, chopped tomato, and picante sauce to taste.
13. Fold the tortilla over the egg to form a taco.
